document.docAuthor: Mongkolsamrit, Suchada, Noisripoom, Wasana, Tasanathai, Kanoksri, Kobmoo, Noppol, Thanakitpipattana, Donnaya, Khonsanit, Artit, Petcharad, Booppa, Sakolrak, Baramee & Himaman, Winanda
document.docTitle: Hevansia arachnophila Luangsa-ard, Hywel-Jones & Spatafora, IMA Fungus 8: 348 2017
document.masterDocTitle: Comprehensive treatise of Hevansia and three new genera Jenniferia, Parahevansia and Polystromomyces on spiders in Cordycipitaceae from Thailand

paragraph.taxonomicName: Hevansia arachnophila (Petch) Luangsa-ard, Hywel-Jones & Spatafora, IMA Fungus 8: 348 (2017).

subSubSection.paragraph: Trichosterigma arachnophilum ≡ Trichosterigma arachnophilum Petch [as ' Hevansia arachnophila '], Trans. Br. mycol. Soc. 8: 215 (1923).
Hirsutella arachnophila ≡ Hirsutella arachnophila (Petch) Petch, Trans. Br. mycol. Soc. 9: 93 (1923).
Akanthomyces arachnophilus ≡ Akanthomyces arachnophilus (Petch) Samson & H.C. Evans, Acta bot. neerl. 23: 33 (1974).
